description: During a trip with multiple stops, a rider wants to add another stop.

nodes.task_description: The rider uses their app to add a new stop to the in-progress trip.

expected_outcome.value: The app receives the request to modify the trip.

nodes.task_description: The system recalculates the route and the estimated fare with the new stop included.

expected_outcome.value: A new route and fare estimate are generated.

nodes.task_description: The rider confirms the change and the new fare.

expected_outcome.value: The rider agrees to the updated trip.

nodes.task_description: The system sends the updated route to the driver's navigation app.

expected_outcome.value: The driver is now guided along the newly modified route.
